description: Python file iterator + f.tell() incompatibility: for raw in f: prevents f.tell() calls (OSError: telling position disabled by next() call).
resolution: Use readline() in a while loop instead of the file iterator when incremental seek/tell is needed.

name: tui-live-tokens-robustness
description: TUI _read_live_tokens robustness: wrap call in try/except Exception in _poll_state; add isinstance(entry, dict) guard; use int(val or 0) for nullable token fields; smart JSONDecodeError (continue complete lines, break incomplete).
